content.full_text:
California 
Fair Political 
Practices Commission 
Susan Daily 
Maricopa city Clerk 
P.O. Box 548 
Maricopa, 
CA 
93252 
Dear Ms. Daily: 
September 28, 1988 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. 1-88-341 
You have requested advice about the filing obligations of a 
person under the conflict of interest disclosure provisions of the 
Political Reform Act.1J 
Because you do not indicate that you have 
been authorized by the person to request advice, this letter is 
considered to be a request for informal assistance.~ 
QUESTION 
Is an appointee to a city council position who resigns from 
office less than 30 days after assuming office required to file an 
assuming office statement and a leaving office statement of 
economic interests? 
CONCLUSION 
An appointee to a city council position who assumes office is 
required to file an assuming office statement and a leaving office 
statement even if the person resigns from office within 30 days of 
assuming office. 
1JGovernment Code Sections 81000-91015. 
All statutory 
references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. 
Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations 
section 18000, et seg. 
All references to regulations are to Title 
2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations. 
~Your letter states only a general question. 
Therefore, we 
consider it to be a request for informal assistance pursuant to 
Regulation 18329(c) (copy enclosed). 
Informal assistance does not 
provide the requestor with the immunity provided by an opinion or 
formal written advice. 
(Section 84113; Regulation 18329(c) (3}.) 
428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916)322-5660 


~Susan Daily 
Page 2 
ANALYSIS 
Members of city councils are required to file statements of 
economic interests. 
(Section 87200.) 
Everyone who is appointed 
to a city council position is required to file a statement within 
10 days after assuming office disclosing his or her investments 
and real property interests. 
(Section 87202.) 
The obligation to 
file an assuming office statement exists regardless of the length 
of service. 
Even though the city council appointee was in office 
less than 30 days, he or she still is required to file an assuming 
office statement. 
within 30 days after leaving office, each city council member 
is required to file a statement disclosing his or her investments, 
interests in real property and sources of income. 
(Section 
87204.) 
A leaving office statement is required regardless of the 
length of service. 
If you have further questions please call me at (916) 322-5662. 
DMG: BWR: kmt 
Sincerely, 
Diane M. Griffiths 
General Counsel 
~~,~ 
By: 
Bruce W. Robeck 
Political Reform Consultant 


CITY OF 
MARICOPA. 
"GATEWAY TO THE SEA" 
Area Code (805) . 769-8279 
Box 548, Maricopa, CA 93252 
August 26, 1988 
Fair Polictical Practices 
P.O. Box 807 
Sacramento, CA 
95804-0807 
Re: SEI Enclosed 
Enclosed please find 
a 
copy of Mr. 
Ron Bracken's resignation from the 
City Council of the City of Maricopa. 
On July 22, 
1988 I 
informed you 
that Mr. 
Bracken had been appointed to fill Ms. Dehn's position on the 
council and that he received his SEI to complete on that date. 
Mr. Bracken 
was at that time informed he had 10 days in which to file his statement. 
On 
August 2, 
I~S8 I 
spoke with Mrs. 
Bracken and informed her that her 
husband's statement was late. 
She informed me that her husband had talked 
to the FPPC and they told him he had thirty days, and she was taking the 
~EI to their accountant that day. 
Mr. Bracken's resignation was accepted 
by ,pur City Council on August 
l~th and became effect ive that date. 
Mr. 
Bracken was in office less than thirty days and the only official action 
he was involved in was the final adoption or an ordinance regarding the 
:;:egulation of bicycles and skateboards. 
I would appreciate your official 
ruling as to whether Mr. Bracken must file an assuming and leaving ofrice 
SEI. 
Mr. 
IS, 
Robert 
1988. 
Hill was appointed to fill 
Mr. Hill's SEI is enclosed. 
Hr. 
Brackens 
I would appreciate your reply as soon as possible. 
Sincerely,

Susan Daily

• 
Maricopa City Council 
City of Maricopa 
Maricopa, CA 93252 
Dear Council Members: 
St. Rt. 2c Box 515 
Maricopa, CA 93252 
August 8, 1988 
When I was a councilman twenty years ago, 
it was not a requirement to fill out an Economic 
Disclosure Statement. 
Since I have recently been 
appointed to the Council, I find that this Dis-
closure must be filed in 30 days . 
. With reluctance, I wish to submit my resignation. 
I do not wish to make my private business affairs 
common knowledge . 
I do appreciate the confidence that was shown 
by this appointment. 
If I had known previous to 
the appointment, I would not have accepted the 
position of City Councilman. 
Yours truly, 


Area Code (805) - 769-8279 
August 26, 1988

P.O. Box 807 
Sacramento, CA 
95804-0807
